pr.title: Fix BBDC mentioner resolution to use numeric id, and add 👀 eye reaction
pr.body:
## What

- **Resolve the BBDC @-mentioning user by their numeric id** (`actor['id']`) instead of the slug. Keycloak's `bitbucket_data_center_id` attribute is populated from the OIDC `sub` claim (numeric), so the slug lookup never matched and every job silently fell back to the webhook installer — replies/reactions posted as the installer rather than the invoking user.
- **Add a best-effort 👀 reaction** on the triggering comment (BBDC comment-likes plugin), posted as the resolved invoking user.

This realigns BBDC with how GitHub and GitLab already work — both key on the numeric id (`github_id` via `sender.id`, `gitlab_id` via `sub`) — instead of BBDC being the lone username-keyed provider. Companion chart change: OpenHands-Cloud #647 (flips the `bitbucket_data_center` id-mapper claim back to `sub`).

## Testing

**Verified end-to-end on a real OHE instance:** an @-mention from a non-installer user now gets the 👀 reaction and a reply from that user's own account, not the installer's. Added unit regression tests for the numeric-id lookup and the comment-likes reactions endpoint.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/55a9c701-98dd-4c6b-aa51-8ce11a03d38e



---

To run this PR locally, use the following command:

GUI with Docker:
```
docker run -it --rm   -p 3000:3000   -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock   --add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway   --name openhands-app-df377ac   docker.openhands.dev/openhands/openhands:df377ac
```
pr.author: ak684
